## Type of Change

## Checklist

Before submitting this PR, please confirm:

- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines (see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md#coding-standards))
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] Type checking passes (`npm run typecheck`)
- [ ] Linting passes (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published

## Security Considerations

- [ ] This PR does not introduce any security vulnerabilities
- [ ] No secrets or credentials are exposed in code
- [ ] Input validation is performed where applicable
- [ ] Sensitive data is not logged
